02 — Experience

The journey

Oct 2023 – Present
Mumbai, India
Senior PM, LXP
Cornerstone OnDemand
  • Lead Learning modules serving 1.5M+ enterprise users across global accounts
  • Secured $1M ARR with Santander — architected GBAC to solve a critical multi-tenancy challenge
  • Reengineered search: boosted exact-match weighting → tickets ↓70%, NPS 43→72
  • Launched RAG-based Conversational Learning & Smart Summaries — 100K+ monthly interactions
  • Built post-completion recommendation engine lifting transcript completions by 30%
  • Spearheaded “Unified Navigation” — one of the company’s highest-collaboration projects
  • Promoted to Senior PM within one year
GenAIRAGLXPSearchEnterprise SaaS
Feb 2022 – Oct 2023
Bangalore, India
Associate PM
WorkInSync · MoveInSync
  • Built parking management & meeting room kiosk modules from 1→10
  • Reservation engine with category-based slot restrictions — improved compliance & fairness
  • Reduced parking commotion 70% YoY for Halter AG via open API integration with boom barriers
  • Cut kiosk onboarding time 90% — Richemont deployed 700+ kiosks rapidly
  • Optimised seat availability ~40% via “Team” seat nudges in desk management

Mumbai, India

Capgemini
